name: AACarga_ZDerechos_Revision

relations_found.evidence: FROM LUCCA249 U1 Left Join LUCCA247 P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Revision  ...

wl_code:
BuscaQry is Data Source
TableDeleteAll(TABLE_DerechosRevision)
IF HExecuteSQLQuery(BuscaQry, MyConnectionLucca, hQueryWithoutCorrection + hNoBind,
"SELECT U1.Usuario, U1.Renglon, U1.Revision, P1.TipodeRevision " + ...
" FROM LUCCA249 U1 Left Join LUCCA247 P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Revision  " + ...
"Where U1.Usuario=" + Usuarios.CODIGO + " Order by U1.Renglon ") = False THEN
Error("HFSQL error: " + HErrorInfo())
END
HReadFirst(BuscaQry)
LOOP (HNbRec(BuscaQry))
TableAddLine(TABLE_DerechosRevision, BuscaQry.Usuario, BuscaQry.Renglon, BuscaQry.TipodeRevision)
HReadNext(BuscaQry)
END
Local procedure AACarga_ZZZGuarda410
